feed.title: Get Lost. Then find your way back. - Trail Running
feed.subtitle: Explore everything

entry.title: Yakima Skyline 50k
entry.summary: I normally don't write up trail reports. Normally I run, I have a good time, and I finish and that's about it. This is not one of those stories. This is story of trying to quit and being convinced to continue forward.
entry.content: I normally don't write up trail reports. Normally I run, I have a good time, and I finish and that's about it. This is not one of those stories. This is story of trying to quit and being convinced to continue forward.
